name: wentong-quality-platform
description: Ai质检平台 - 跨平台桌面数据质量管理工具
author: WenTong

scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @wentong/utils build && pnpm --filter @wentong/auth build && pnpm --filter @wentong/database build && pnpm --filter @wentong/data-validator build && pnpm --filter @wentong/image-detector build && pnpm --filter @wentong/pdf-processor build && pnpm --filter @wentong/md5-checker build && pnpm --filter @wentong/metadata-encap build && pnpm --filter @wentong/doc-manager build && pnpm --filter @wentong/app-main build && pnpm --filter @wentong/app-renderer build
